description: Next steps mapping for using cost-per-serving insights (including Black hair nutrition value per dollar) to drive budget-friendly recipe and refill choices.

nextSteps.label: Pick budget-friendly recipes
nextSteps.description: Use cost-per-serving and hair nutrient value per dollar to highlight recipes that fit the household budget and Black hair nutrition goals.

steps.title: Review top-value recipes
steps.desc: Browse recipes ranked by price per serving and hair-supportive nutrients per dollar. Pin the ones you want to keep in rotation.

metadata.cueNotes: Planning-only step; no cooking temperature required.

nextSteps.label: Choose refill options
nextSteps.description: Send low-cost, high-value items to the Storehouse Refill calculator to decide how to restock within budget.

steps.title: Review refill suggestions
steps.desc: Look at low and under-target items, sorted by cost per serving and hair nutrient value per dollar. Mark which ones to refill this cycle.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to decide what to refill now versus later.

nextSteps.label: Schedule batch cooking with best-value items
nextSteps.description: Send selected budget-friendly recipes to the Batch Yield calculator and create a batch cooking session that stretches the budget.

steps.title: Confirm batch recipes
steps.desc: Confirm which low-cost, high-value recipes you want to cook in a single batch session.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to verify you have ingredients and pans ready.

nextSteps.label: Send choices to shopping list
nextSteps.description: Create or update a shopping list containing the best-value items and their target refill quantities.

steps.title: Review list before shopping
steps.desc: Check the suggested items, remove anything you do not need this trip, and lock in quantities based on your budget.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this step to double-check your budget before shopping.

nextSteps.label: Plan garden for expensive staples
nextSteps.description: Identify items that are expensive in the store but hair- and health-supportive, and pass them to the Garden Planner as candidates to grow at home.

sessionTemplate.title: Plan garden to offset pricey foods

steps.title: Select crops to grow
steps.desc: Pick which high-cost, high-nutrition items you want to grow in your garden to lower long-term costs.

metadata.cueNotes: Consider growing herbs, greens, and other Black hair-supportive foods that are pricey in stores.

nextSteps.label: Filter by Black hair nutrition value
nextSteps.description: Send items to the Black Hair Nutrition calculator for deeper analysis of hair-supportive nutrients per dollar.

sessionTemplate.title: Focus on Black hair nutrition value

steps.title: Prioritize hair-supportive foods
steps.desc: Review which items provide the best nutrients for Black hair growth and retention per dollar, and pin them as household staples.

metadata.cueNotes: This step is for nutritional planning only.
